T^. 2m3\?R, [TO 3 11/11/2007-^5^^] i n Trmt, * f f * r *rfa* (TI ^ * £ ) • ^ ^ 1 ^ S 29 ^ P ^ T , 2007 ^ srfsRplT ^t^n.3TL 2005(31),WT ^ ^ W ^ a r f a g ^ TO^ICT ^ t TJ§ «fti MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 30th November, 2009 S.O. 3077(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of Section 5A of Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.0.2005(E), dated the 29th November, 2007, namely :— 2. The Central Government hereby nominates Joint Secretary (Animal Welfare), Ministry of Environment and Forest as Member, under Section 5 (1) (be) in place of Maj. Gen. (Retd.) Dr. R. M. Kharb (Sr. No. 4). 3. Membership of Dr. R. M. Kharb is changed fron Member under Section 5(1) (be) to Member under Section 5( 1) (c) in place of Dr. V. N. Appaji Rao (Sr. No. 7). [F.No. ll/ll/2007-AWD] HEM PANDE, Jt. Secy. (AW) Note : The earlier notification regarding reconstitution of the Animal Welfare Board of India was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 2005(E), dated the 29th November, 2007. 4380GI/2009 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Pubticalions, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
